title: Ring Designer with Gems & Time Control
prompt:
Create a single HTML file implementing an interactive 3D ring designer with gem placement and time-based animation control using Three.js.

## Scene Setup
- Initialize a Three.js scene with a dark gradient background (top: #1a1a2e, bottom: #16213e).
- Use a PerspectiveCamera at position (0, 2, 5) looking at the origin.
- Add OrbitControls for camera rotation (damping enabled).
- Add three lights: an AmbientLight (0x404060, intensity 0.5), a DirectionalLight (0xffffff, intensity 1.0) at position (5, 10, 5), and a PointLight (0xff88cc, intensity 0.8) at position (-3, 3, -3).
- Load the 'DamagedHelmet.glb' model using GLTFLoader. Scale it to (0.3, 0.3, 0.3) and position it at (3, 0, 0) as a reference/showcase object. It should slowly rotate on Y axis.

## Ring Construction
- Create a torus geometry (radius 1.0, tube 0.15, radialSegments 32, tubularSegments 100) as the ring band.
- Use MeshStandardMaterial with metalness 0.95, roughness 0.05, color starting at gold (0xFFD700).
- The ring should float at y=0 and slowly rotate on Y axis (speed controlled by time control).

## Gem System
- Support placing up to 6 gems on the ring at evenly spaced positions around the top half of the torus.
- Each gem is an OctahedronGeometry(0.12, 0) with MeshPhysicalMaterial (transmission 0.9, thickness 0.5, roughness 0, ior 2.4).
- Gem types with colors: 'diamond' (#ffffff), 'ruby' (#ff0040), 'emerald' (#00ff80), 'sapphire' (#0040ff), 'amethyst' (#9900ff), 'topaz' (#ffaa00).
- Gems should have a subtle pulsing glow animation (emissive intensity oscillates 0.0 to 0.5).

## UI Controls (DOM Elements)
- Create a top-left panel with id='control-panel' containing:
  - A dropdown select with id='gem-select' with options for each gem type.
  - A button with id='btn-add-gem' text 'Add Gem' that adds the selected gem type to the next available slot.
  - A button with id='btn-remove-gem' text 'Remove Last Gem' that removes the most recently added gem.
  - A button with id='btn-clear-gems' text 'Clear All' that removes all gems.
- Create a bottom panel with id='time-panel' containing:
  - A range slider with id='time-slider' (min=0, max=100, value=50) controlling animation speed multiplier (0 = paused, 50 = normal 1x, 100 = 2x speed).
  - A button with id='btn-pause' text 'Pause' that toggles pause/resume (text changes to 'Resume' when paused).
  - A button with id='btn-reset-time' text 'Reset Time' that resets the internal animation clock to 0.
- Create a right panel with id='material-panel' containing:
  - Buttons for ring materials: id='btn-gold' (0xFFD700), id='btn-silver' (0xC0C0C0), id='btn-rose-gold' (0xB76E79), id='btn-platinum' (0xE5E4E2).
- Display a HUD with id='hud-info' showing: gem count, current material name, time speed, and total animation time elapsed.

## Ring Material Switching
- Clicking a material button changes the ring's color and updates state.
- Gold: color 0xFFD700, metalness 0.95, roughness 0.05
- Silver: color 0xC0C0C0, metalness 0.9, roughness 0.1
- Rose Gold: color 0xB76E79, metalness 0.92, roughness 0.08
- Platinum: color 0xE5E4E2, metalness 0.98, roughness 0.03

## Keyboard Controls
- Press 'R' to toggle ring auto-rotation on/off.
- Press 'G' to cycle through gem types in the dropdown.
- Press 'Space' to toggle pause (same as pause button).
- Press '1'-'4' to switch ring materials (1=gold, 2=silver, 3=rose-gold, 4=platinum).

## Time Control System
- Maintain an internal animation clock (elapsedTime) that advances based on the speed multiplier.
- Speed multiplier = slider value / 50 (so 0=stopped, 1=normal at 50, 2=fast at 100).
- When paused, elapsedTime does not advance regardless of slider.
- All animations (ring rotation, gem pulsing, helmet rotation) use this controlled time.
- 'Reset Time' sets elapsedTime back to 0.

## State Management
Expose window.__3D_STATE__ with these fields updated every frame:
- gemCount: number (0-6)
- gems: array of objects [{type: string, slotIndex: number}]
- ringMaterial: string ('gold'|'silver'|'rose-gold'|'platinum')
- ringColor: hex number (e.g., 0xFFD700)
- ringRotating: boolean
- timeSpeed: number (0.0 to 2.0, the multiplier)
- isPaused: boolean
- elapsedTime: number (seconds, the controlled animation time)
- helmetLoaded: boolean
- ringRotationY: number (current Y rotation in radians)
- gemPulseIntensity: number (current emissive intensity of gems, 0.0-0.5)
- selectedGemType: string (current dropdown selection)
- maxGems: 6

Ensure all animations are frame-rate independent using delta time multiplied by the speed factor.
physics_constraints: Ring rotation must be continuous and proportional to timeSpeed. Gem pulse frequency must be consistent. Time accumulation must be monotonically increasing (except on reset). All numerical state values must be NaN-free. Gem positions must be evenly distributed on the ring torus surface.
